titleStmt.title: SII 9.495: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 495. (A.R. No. 330 of 1905.) ON A SLAB LYING IN FRONT OF THE ANJANEYA TEMPLE AT CHINAMASAPALLE, CUDDAPAH TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1436, Bhāva, Chaitra, śu. 1, Sōmavāra corresponding to A.D. 1514 March 27 Monday, in the reign of Kṛishṇarāya-Mahārāya. It records that the king made a gift of the village Chika-Māñchupalli in Chenūri-sīme a sub-division of Mulukināḍu-sīme, for the service of the god Channakēśavadēva at Pushpagiri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . jayābhyudayaśālivāha
naśakavarpaṁbulu 1436 saṁda mēle
naḍada bhāvasaṁvatsarada caitra śu 1 sō
lū śrīmaṁnumahārājādhirā
ja paramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīkruṣṇarā
yamahārāyaru puṣpagiriya ca(ṁ)
nnakēśavadēvarige koṭa grāmada dharmaśā
sana canna kēśavadēvarige pūje punaskāra A
mṛtapaḍi nayivēdeke mulukināṭi śīme vo
ḷage cenūriśīme Oḷagaṇa cikamāṁcupalli grāma
vanū tathātithi manvādi pu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalu sahira(ṁ)
ṇyōdakadānadhārāpūrvakavāgi samarpiste
vu . I cikamāṁcupalliya grāmada catusī
mage Oḷagāda gade bedalu tōṭa tuḍike nidhi nikṣēpa
jala pāṣāṇa Akṣīṇi Āgāmi sidha sādhyagaḷeṁba
Aṣṭabhōga tēja ssvāmya Ēnuṁṭādanū Āgumāḍi
koṁḍu ceṁnakēśavadēvara pūje punaskāra Amṛ
tapaḍi naivēdyavanū ceṁnāgi naḍasaluḷḷavaru ya
ṁdu koṭa dharmaśāsana . śrīvirūpākṣa .
maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī jēyu(ṁ)nu . dānapālana
yōrmadhyē dānāt śrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānātsvarga
mavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . svadattāddvi
guṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradatānupālanaṁ . paradatāpa
hārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . svadattaṁ para
dataṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvarṣasa
hasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kri�mo .
Digital edition of SII 9.495 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
